articles.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
articles.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement. The Department says WAR.GOV/UFO has received over 1 billion hits worldwide since its May 8, 2026 launch, which it frames as evidence of major public interest in the topic and in the Trump administration's transparency effort. The statement adds that the Department of War and agency partners are working on a third UAP file release, which will be announced in the near future.

The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Das Kriegsministerium gibt bekannt, dass es die zweite Veröffentlichung freigegebener und historischer Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen als Teil des Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE) veröffentlicht. In der Pressemitteilung heißt es, dass die Sammlung weiterhin auf WAR.GOV/UFO gespeichert bleibt und dass weitere Dateien fortlaufend veröffentlicht werden. Als Quelle der Aussage wird der Assistent des Kriegsministers für öffentliche Angelegenheiten und Chefsprecher des Pentagons, Sean Parnell, genannt.

articles.title: Multiple Pastors Claim U.S. Military Intelligence Officers Secretly Briefed Them To Prepare Their Congregations For UAP Disclosure
articles.summary: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claims the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in highly classified military programs, citing crash‑retrieval operations that operate beyond elected officials' oversight. He says sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and deeply compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some data remains inaccessible even to senior officials. Alberino discussed recent UAP file releases from the Trump administration, describing them as underwhelming and predicting more significant material could appear later. He referenced eyewitness accounts of gray aliens, dismembered bodies, and transparent fluids, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch's 2023 testimony that the U.S. recovered non‑human biologics, though no independent verification exists. Scientists and mainstream researchers note that no publicly available physical evidence confirms extraterrestrial life or recovered alien technology, and the Pentagon maintains that All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office investigations have not produced verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity. Lawmakers such as Representative Tim Burchett and Representative Anna Paulina Luna have called for greater transparency and whistleblower protections amid ongoing congressional interest in UAP investigations.

de.title: Mehrere Pastoren behaupten, US-Militärgeheimdienstoffiziere hätten sie heimlich informiert, um ihre Gemeinden auf die UAP-Offenlegung vorzubereiten
de.summary: Der investigative Autor Timothy Alberino behauptet, die US-Regierung habe außerirdische Leichen geborgen und sie in streng geheimen Militärprogrammen versteckt, und verweist auf Bergungsoperationen, die außerhalb der Kontrolle gewählter Amtsträger stattfinden. Er sagt, dass vertrauliche UAP-Informationen von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert werden und dass einige Daten selbst für hochrangige Beamte unzugänglich bleiben.

articles.title: Bone-chilling preview released for Steven Spielberg's highly anticipated UFO movie 'Disclosure Day'
articles.summary: Steven Spielberg’s upcoming UFO film “Disclosure Day” has released its final preview, described as intense. The film stars Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson, and Colman Domingo, and is directed by Spielberg. The plot centers on the idea of discovering that humanity is not alone and the potential fear that would bring. The trailer for the film has accumulated more than 4.3 million views on YouTube in under 24 hours. “Disclosure Day” will be released in theaters on June 12, 2026.

articles.title: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026
articles.summary: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026 Steven Spielberg's 1977 classic tapped into anxieties about the US government hiding UFO information from the public. When trailers for Steven Spielberg's Disclosure Day confirmed that it deals with extraterrestrials, the internet exploded with speculation that it was a sequel to his 1977 classic, Close Encounters of the Third Kind. The guesswork became so rampant that the press notes for the new film cheekily announce it is "not a sequel to Close Encounters (sorry, internet)". Emily Blunt, one of Disclosure Day's stars, has described it as resembling "a third act" along with Close Encounters and ET The Extra-Terrestrial (1982).

de.title: Unheimliche Begegnungen, UFOs und Vertuschungen: Warum Spielbergs Verschwörungstheorie-Klassiker von 1977 im Jahr 2026 so relevant ist
de.summary: Unheimliche Begegnungen, UFOs und Vertuschungen: Warum Spielbergs Verschwörungstheorie-Klassiker von 1977 im Jahr 2026 so relevant ist. Steven Spielbergs Klassiker von 1977 griff die Befürchtungen auf, die US-Regierung könnte UFO-Informationen vor der Öffentlichkeit verbergen. Als Trailer zu Steven Spielbergs „Disclosure Day“ bestätigten, dass es sich dabei um Außerirdische handelt, explodierten im Internet Spekulationen darüber, dass es sich um eine Fortsetzung seines Klassikers „Unheimliche Begegnung der dritten Art“ aus dem Jahr 1977 handeln könnte.

articles.title: MITRE moves to comply with lawmaker’s request for UAP records and assets dating back to 1930
articles.summary: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work. A MITRE spokesperson said that if relevant material is found, the company will coordinate with federal agencies to provide the assets. The request is part of a broader congressional effort to increase UAP disclosure, though no evidence of extraterrestrial activity has been confirmed.

en.title: MITRE moves to comply with lawmaker’s request for UAP records and assets dating back to 1930
en.summary: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work.

de.title: MITRE kommt der Forderung des Gesetzgebers nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen und Vermögenswerten aus dem Jahr 1930 nach
de.summary: Die MITRE Corporation überprüft ihre Archive, um einer Anfrage des Abgeordneten Eric Burlison nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen aus dem Jahr 1930 nachzukommen und herauszufinden, ob die Organisation jemals Informationen über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene besessen oder verarbeitet hat. In der Anfrage, die mehr als 40 spezifische Datenanfragen und Anweisungen zur Benennung eines hochrangigen Beamten, zur Ausstellung einer Aufbewahrungssperre und zur Übermittlung nicht klassifizierter Unterlagen innerhalb von 45 Tagen umfasst, werden auch Unterlagen gefordert, die große Verteidigungsunternehmen und UAP-bezogene Arbeiten betreffen.

articles.title: Did Brazilian influencer Mayk Leão really capture a UFO over his rural farm in Campo Largo? Here's what we know
articles.summary: Markdown Content: Digital content producer Mayk Leão, widely recognized on virtual platforms for his work dedicated to rescuing and rehabilitating animals at risk, surprised his followers by changing the focus of his publications. Acostumado documenting his wildlife care routine, the influencer used his profiles to report an unusual experience on his rural property. The episode occurred on a site located in the municipality of Campo Largo, which is part of Região Metropolitana of Curitiba, in the state of Paraná. The change of agenda happened after the video recording of a supposed unidentified flying object crossing the sky in the region.

de.title: Hat der brasilianische Influencer Mayk Leão wirklich ein UFO über seiner ländlichen Farm in Campo Largo eingefangen? Das wissen wir
de.summary: Markdown-Inhalte: Mayk Leão, Produzent digitaler Inhalte, der auf virtuellen Plattformen weithin für seine Arbeit zur Rettung und Rehabilitation gefährdeter Tiere bekannt ist, überraschte seine Anhänger, indem er den Schwerpunkt seiner Veröffentlichungen änderte. Als Acostumado dokumentierte der Influencer seine Routine bei der Tierpflege und nutzte seine Profile, um über ein ungewöhnliches Erlebnis auf seinem Landgrundstück zu berichten. Der Vorfall ereignete sich an einem Ort in der Gemeinde Campo Largo, die zur Região Metropolitana Curitiba im Bundesstaat Paraná gehört.

articles.title: UFO-Linked General William Neil McCasland Met US Space Force Personnel Hours Before Disappearance, Audio
articles.summary: Retired U.S. Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland, 68, was reported missing on February 27, 2026 from his Albuquerque home. Body‑cam audio obtained by Law & Crime shows McCasland attended a dinner with U.S. Space Force personnel and an unidentified woman the evening before he vanished, during which the woman discussed his high‑security clearance and ties to classified UFO programs. UFO whistleblower David Grusch had earlier named McCasland as uncooperative with congressional oversight and listed him among officials who managed legacy classified programs. The Bernalillo County Sheriff’s Office, FBI, and New Mexico Search and Rescue have been conducting a multi‑agency search after a Silver Alert; investigators note he left his home on foot, left behind his phone, glasses, and wearable devices, but missing items include hiking boots, wallet, and a .38‑caliber revolver. No definitive evidence of foul play has been found, and McCasland’s wife says he has held only standard clearances since retirement, suggesting his disappearance may not be linked to old military secrets. The investigation remains ongoing, with uncertainty about the cause of his disappearance.

articles.title: Whistleblower claims CIA used DNA data from Ancestry and 23andMe customers in search for aliens
articles.summary: A whistleblower, philosopher and novelist Jason Reza Jorjani, claims the CIA allegedly used a backdoor to access 23andMe and Ancestry.com data to identify individuals with a genetic variance he says is linked to extraterrestrial DNA. Jorjani says he learned of the program from army veteran Lyn Buchanan, who claims he was a psychic spy in the CIA’s remote‑viewing program and that former CIA analyst Christopher “Kit” Green created the backdoor. Buchanan reports that he was approached by three people who identified themselves as Nordic aliens and that they asked him to help avoid CIA detection, while also claiming aliens have interbred with humans and that a “wedge” labeled “other” on ethnicity charts may contain unknown genetic markers. The Pentagon has stated there is no evidence of extraterrestrial existence, and a separate geneticist, Dr. Max Rempel, has suggested that alien DNA could have been inserted into humans, though he says it may not be harmful.

de.title: Whistleblower behauptet, die CIA habe DNA-Daten von Ancestry- und 23andMe-Kunden bei der Suche nach Außerirdischen verwendet
de.summary: Ein Whistleblower, Philosoph und Romanautor Jason Reza Jorjani, behauptet, die CIA habe angeblich eine Hintertür genutzt, um auf Daten von 23andMe und Ancestry.com zuzugreifen, um Personen mit einer genetischen Varianz zu identifizieren, die seiner Meinung nach mit außerirdischer DNA zusammenhängt. Jorjani sagt, er habe von dem Programm durch den Armeeveteranen Lyn Buchanan erfahren, der behauptet, er sei ein übersinnlicher Spion im Remote-Viewing-Programm der CIA gewesen und der ehemalige CIA-Analyst Christopher „Kit“ Green habe die Hintertür geschaffen.

articles.title: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping
articles.summary: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping While believers see slow disclosure, sceptics call the latest UFO wave 'pure science fiction. ' Fresh UFO file releases and a viral claim about 'four alien species' have pushed extraterrestrial conspiracy theories back into the centre of internet culture — but not everyone is buying it. As newly declassified government documents circulate online, many social media users are calling the latest wave of UFO disclosure a carefully timed distraction rather than proof of alien life. The debate intensified after physicist Hal Puthoff claimed insiders involved in alleged crash-retrieval programmes described at least four different non-human species, reviving decades-old theories about Greys, Reptilians and other extraterrestrial beings long tied to UFO folklore.

en.title: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping
en.summary: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping While believers see slow disclosure, sceptics call the latest UFO wave 'pure science fiction. ' Fresh UFO file releases and a viral claim about 'four alien species' have pushed extraterrestrial conspiracy theories back into the centre of internet culture — but not everyone is buying it. As newly declassified government documents circulate online, many social media users are calling the latest wave of UFO disclosure a carefully timed distraction rather than proof of alien life.

de.title: Das Internet hält die UFO-Dateien für „Ablenkungen“ und die Theorie der „vier außerirdischen Arten“ hilft nicht weiter
de.summary: Das Internet denkt, die UFO-Dateien seien „Ablenkungen“ und die „4 außerirdische Arten“-Theorie hilft nicht. Während Gläubige eine langsame Offenlegung sehen, bezeichnen Skeptiker die jüngste UFO-Welle als „reine Science-Fiction“. Neue Veröffentlichungen von UFO-Dateien und eine virale Behauptung über „vier außerirdische Arten“ haben außerirdische Verschwörungstheorien wieder in den Mittelpunkt der Internetkultur gerückt – aber nicht jeder glaubt das. Während neu freigegebene Regierungsdokumente online kursieren, bezeichnen viele Social-Media-Nutzer die jüngste Welle der UFO-Enthüllungen als eine sorgfältig geplante Ablenkung und nicht als Beweis für das Leben von Außerirdischen.

articles.title: Influencer reports alleged UFO sighting in Paraná, goes viral with millions of views, and says he lives between fascination and fear after mysterious phenomenon
articles.summary: Lights recorded in the rural area of Campo Largo, unusual sounds in the forest, and an object observed for dozens of minutes transformed the routine of a content creator and mobilized specialists, curious people, and researchers of aerial phenomena A supposed UFO sighting in the rural area of Campo Largo, in the Metropolitan Region of Curitiba, transformed the life of digital influencer Mayk Leão, 31, in recent days. The case, recorded on the night of May 31, 2026, gained national attention after videos posted on social media accumulated millions of views and sparked debates about the possibility of an unusual aerial phenomenon.

de.title: Influencer meldet angebliche UFO-Sichtung in Paraná, wird millionenfach viral und sagt, er lebe zwischen Faszination und Angst nach einem mysteriösen Phänomen
de.summary: In der ländlichen Gegend von Campo Largo aufgenommene Lichter, ungewöhnliche Geräusche im Wald und ein Dutzende Minuten lang beobachtetes Objekt veränderten die Routine eines Content-Erstellers und mobilisierten Spezialisten, Neugierige und Forscher von Luftphänomenen. Eine angebliche UFO-Sichtung in der ländlichen Gegend von Campo Largo in der Metropolregion Curitiba veränderte in den letzten Tagen das Leben der digitalen Influencerin Mayk Leão, 31. Der in der Nacht des 31. Mai 2026 aufgezeichnete Fall erlangte landesweite Aufmerksamkeit, nachdem in den sozialen Medien veröffentlichte Videos millionenfach angeklickt wurden und Debatten über die Möglichkeit eines ungewöhnlichen Luftphänomens auslösten.

articles.title: The World's Largest UFO Conference Is Open Today, and It's Free
articles.summary: The world's largest UFO and UAP conference is underway in the Coachella Valley. Contact in the Desert opened its 12th annual event Thursday at the Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells, running through June 1. The conference brings together scientists, researchers, and journalists from around the world for panels and discussions on extraterrestrial life, UAP disclosure, and other unexplained phenomena. All of Thursday’s programming is free and open to the public. One‑day and five‑day passes are available at contactinthedesert.com.

en.title: The World's Largest UFO Conference Is Open Today, and It's Free
en.summary: The world's largest UFO and UAP conference is underway in the Coachella Valley. Contact in the Desert opened its 12th annual event Thursday at the Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells, running through June 1. The conference brings together scientists, researchers, and journalists from around the world for panels and discussions on extraterrestrial life, UAP disclosure, and other unexplained phenomena.

de.title: Die weltweit größte UFO-Konferenz ist heute geöffnet und kostenlos
de.summary: Im Coachella Valley findet die weltweit größte UFO- und UAP-Konferenz statt. Contact in the Desert eröffnete am Donnerstag im Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells seine 12. jährliche Veranstaltung, die bis zum 1. Juni läuft. Die Konferenz bringt Wissenschaftler, Forscher und Journalisten aus der ganzen Welt zu Panels und Diskussionen über außerirdisches Leben, UAP-Offenlegung und andere ungeklärte Phänomene zusammen.

summaries.file-release-department-of-war-publishes: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement. The Department says WAR.GOV/UFO has received over 1 billion hits worldwide since its May 8, 2026 launch, which it frames as evidence of major public interest in the topic and in the Trump administration's transparency effort. The statement adds that the Department of War and agency partners are working on a third UAP file release, which will be announced in the near future.
summaries.file-release-multiple-pastors-claim-u-s-: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claims the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in highly classified military programs, citing crash‑retrieval operations that operate beyond elected officials' oversight. He says sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and deeply compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some data remains inaccessible even to senior officials. Alberino discussed recent UAP file releases from the Trump administration, describing them as underwhelming and predicting more significant material could appear later. He referenced eyewitness accounts of gray aliens, dismembered bodies, and transparent fluids, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch's 2023 testimony that the U.S. recovered non‑human biologics, though no independent verification exists. Scientists and mainstream researchers note that no publicly available physical evidence confirms extraterrestrial life or recovered alien technology, and the Pentagon maintains that All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office investigations have not produced verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity. Lawmakers such as Representative Tim Burchett and Representative Anna Paulina Luna have called for greater transparency and whistleblower protections amid ongoing congressional interest in UAP investigations.
summaries.film-bone-chilling-preview-released-for-: Steven Spielberg’s upcoming UFO film “Disclosure Day” has released its final preview, described as intense. The film stars Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson, and Colman Domingo, and is directed by Spielberg. The plot centers on the idea of discovering that humanity is not alone and the potential fear that would bring. The trailer for the film has accumulated more than 4.3 million views on YouTube in under 24 hours. “Disclosure Day” will be released in theaters on June 12, 2026.
summaries.trump-aliens-website-is-about-immigratio: gov' website and immigration satire Skip to content NewsNation Sponsored By Toggle Menu [](https://www. com/) Newsletter GoGo Go ## Primary Menu * Trending * MISSING SCIENTISTS * FAKE CANCER CASE * KYLE BUSCH * All Topics * Politics * 2026 Election * Crime * Your Money * Social Security calculator * Budget calculator * Mortgage calculator * Credit card debt calculator * Savings calculator * Border Report * Space * UFOs * Entertainment * Missing * Shows * Morning In America * NewsNation Live * Elizabeth Vargas Reports * The Hill on NewsNation * On Balance with Leland Vittert * [[CUOMO]](https://www. com/cuomo-show/) * Katie Pavlich Tonight * Jesse Weber Live * NewsNation PRIME * The Hill Sunday * Batya!
summaries.film-close-encounters-ufos-and-cover-ups: Close Encounters, UFOs and cover-ups: Why Spielberg's 1977 conspiracy theory classic is so relevant in 2026 Steven Spielberg's 1977 classic tapped into anxieties about the US government hiding UFO information from the public. When trailers for Steven Spielberg's Disclosure Day confirmed that it deals with extraterrestrials, the internet exploded with speculation that it was a sequel to his 1977 classic, Close Encounters of the Third Kind. The guesswork became so rampant that the press notes for the new film cheekily announce it is "not a sequel to Close Encounters (sorry, internet)". Emily Blunt, one of Disclosure Day's stars, has described it as resembling "a third act" along with Close Encounters and ET The Extra-Terrestrial (1982).
summaries.mitre-moves-to-comply-with-lawmaker-s-re: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work. A MITRE spokesperson said that if relevant material is found, the company will coordinate with federal agencies to provide the assets. The request is part of a broader congressional effort to increase UAP disclosure, though no evidence of extraterrestrial activity has been confirmed.
summaries.sighting-did-brazilian-influencer-mayk-l: Markdown Content: Digital content producer Mayk Leão, widely recognized on virtual platforms for his work dedicated to rescuing and rehabilitating animals at risk, surprised his followers by changing the focus of his publications. Acostumado documenting his wildlife care routine, the influencer used his profiles to report an unusual experience on his rural property. The episode occurred on a site located in the municipality of Campo Largo, which is part of Região Metropolitana of Curitiba, in the state of Paraná. The change of agenda happened after the video recording of a supposed unidentified flying object crossing the sky in the region.
summaries.ufo-linked-general-william-neil-mccaslan: Retired U.S. Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland, 68, was reported missing on February 27, 2026 from his Albuquerque home. Body‑cam audio obtained by Law & Crime shows McCasland attended a dinner with U.S. Space Force personnel and an unidentified woman the evening before he vanished, during which the woman discussed his high‑security clearance and ties to classified UFO programs. UFO whistleblower David Grusch had earlier named McCasland as uncooperative with congressional oversight and listed him among officials who managed legacy classified programs. The Bernalillo County Sheriff’s Office, FBI, and New Mexico Search and Rescue have been conducting a multi‑agency search after a Silver Alert; investigators note he left his home on foot, left behind his phone, glasses, and wearable devices, but missing items include hiking boots, wallet, and a .38‑caliber revolver. No definitive evidence of foul play has been found, and McCasland’s wife says he has held only standard clearances since retirement, suggesting his disappearance may not be linked to old military secrets. The investigation remains ongoing, with uncertainty about the cause of his disappearance.
summaries.program-whistleblower-claims-cia-used-dn: A whistleblower, philosopher and novelist Jason Reza Jorjani, claims the CIA allegedly used a backdoor to access 23andMe and Ancestry.com data to identify individuals with a genetic variance he says is linked to extraterrestrial DNA. Jorjani says he learned of the program from army veteran Lyn Buchanan, who claims he was a psychic spy in the CIA’s remote‑viewing program and that former CIA analyst Christopher “Kit” Green created the backdoor. Buchanan reports that he was approached by three people who identified themselves as Nordic aliens and that they asked him to help avoid CIA detection, while also claiming aliens have interbred with humans and that a “wedge” labeled “other” on ethnicity charts may contain unknown genetic markers. The Pentagon has stated there is no evidence of extraterrestrial existence, and a separate geneticist, Dr. Max Rempel, has suggested that alien DNA could have been inserted into humans, though he says it may not be harmful.
summaries.internet-thinks-the-ufo-files-are-distra: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping While believers see slow disclosure, sceptics call the latest UFO wave 'pure science fiction. As newly declassified government documents circulate online, many social media users are calling the latest wave of UFO disclosure a carefully timed distraction rather than proof of alien life. The debate intensified after physicist Hal Puthoff claimed insiders involved in alleged crash-retrieval programmes described at least four different non-human species, reviving decades-old theories about Greys, Reptilians and other extraterrestrial beings long tied to UFO folklore.

The case, recorded on the night of May 31, 2026, gained national attention after videos posted on social media accumulated millions of views and sparked debates about the possibility of an unusual aerial phenomenon.

en.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
en.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Das Kriegsministerium gibt bekannt, dass es die zweite Veröffentlichung freigegebener und historischer Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen als Teil des Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE) veröffentlicht. In der Pressemitteilung heißt es, dass die Sammlung weiterhin auf WAR.GOV/UFO gespeichert bleibt und dass weitere Dateien fortlaufend veröffentlicht werden. Als Quelle der Aussage wird der Assistent des Kriegsministers für öffentliche Angelegenheiten und Chefsprecher des Pentagons, Sean Parnell, genannt.

en.summary: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claims the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in highly classified military programs, citing crash‑retrieval operations that operate beyond elected officials' oversight. He says sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and deeply compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some data remains inaccessible even to senior officials.

de.title: Mehrere Pastoren behaupten, US-Militärgeheimdienstoffiziere hätten sie heimlich informiert, um ihre Gemeinden auf die UAP-Offenlegung vorzubereiten
de.summary: Der investigative Autor Timothy Alberino behauptet, die US-Regierung habe außerirdische Leichen geborgen und sie in streng geheimen Militärprogrammen versteckt, und verweist auf Bergungsoperationen, die außerhalb der Kontrolle gewählter Amtsträger stattfinden. Er sagt, dass vertrauliche UAP-Informationen von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert werden und dass einige Daten selbst für hochrangige Beamte unzugänglich bleiben.

de.title: Gruselige Vorschau auf Steven Spielbergs mit Spannung erwarteten UFO-Film „Disclosure Day“ veröffentlicht
de.summary: Steven Spielbergs kommender UFO-Film „Disclosure Day“ hat seine letzte Vorschau veröffentlicht, die als intensiv beschrieben wird. de.title: Unheimliche Begegnungen, UFOs und Vertuschungen: Warum Spielbergs Verschwörungstheorie-Klassiker von 1977 im Jahr 2026 so relevant ist
de.summary: Unheimliche Begegnungen, UFOs und Vertuschungen: Warum Spielbergs Verschwörungstheorie-Klassiker von 1977 im Jahr 2026 so relevant ist. Steven Spielbergs Klassiker von 1977 griff die Befürchtungen auf, die US-Regierung könnte UFO-Informationen vor der Öffentlichkeit verbergen. Als Trailer zu Steven Spielbergs „Disclosure Day“ bestätigten, dass es sich dabei um Außerirdische handelt, explodierten im Internet Spekulationen darüber, dass es sich um eine Fortsetzung seines Klassikers „Unheimliche Begegnung der dritten Art“ aus dem Jahr 1977 handeln könnte.

en.title: MITRE moves to comply with lawmaker’s request for UAP records and assets dating back to 1930
en.summary: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work.

de.title: MITRE kommt der Forderung des Gesetzgebers nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen und Vermögenswerten aus dem Jahr 1930 nach
de.summary: Die MITRE Corporation überprüft ihre Archive, um einer Anfrage des Abgeordneten Eric Burlison nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen aus dem Jahr 1930 nachzukommen und herauszufinden, ob die Organisation jemals Informationen über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene besessen oder verarbeitet hat. In der Anfrage, die mehr als 40 spezifische Datenanfragen und Anweisungen zur Benennung eines hochrangigen Beamten, zur Ausstellung einer Aufbewahrungssperre und zur Übermittlung nicht klassifizierter Unterlagen innerhalb von 45 Tagen umfasst, werden auch Unterlagen gefordert, die große Verteidigungsunternehmen und UAP-bezogene Arbeiten betreffen.

en.title: Did Brazilian influencer Mayk Leão really capture a UFO over his rural farm in Campo Largo? Here's what we know
en.summary: Markdown Content: Digital content producer Mayk Leão, widely recognized on virtual platforms for his work dedicated to rescuing and rehabilitating animals at risk, surprised his followers by changing the focus of his publications. Acostumado documenting his wildlife care routine, the influencer used his profiles to report an unusual experience on his rural property. The episode occurred on a site located in the municipality of Campo Largo, which is part of Região Metropolitana of Curitiba, in the state of Paraná.

de.title: Hat der brasilianische Influencer Mayk Leão wirklich ein UFO über seiner ländlichen Farm in Campo Largo eingefangen? Das wissen wir
de.summary: Markdown-Inhalte: Mayk Leão, Produzent digitaler Inhalte, der auf virtuellen Plattformen weithin für seine Arbeit zur Rettung und Rehabilitation gefährdeter Tiere bekannt ist, überraschte seine Anhänger, indem er den Schwerpunkt seiner Veröffentlichungen änderte. Als Acostumado dokumentierte der Influencer seine Routine bei der Tierpflege und nutzte seine Profile, um über ein ungewöhnliches Erlebnis auf seinem Landgrundstück zu berichten. Der Vorfall ereignete sich an einem Ort in der Gemeinde Campo Largo, die zur Região Metropolitana Curitiba im Bundesstaat Paraná gehört.

en.title: UFO-Linked General William Neil McCasland Met US Space Force Personnel Hours Before Disappearance, Audio
en.summary: Retired U.S. Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland, 68, was reported missing on February 27, 2026 from his Albuquerque home. Body‑cam audio obtained by Law & Crime shows McCasland attended a dinner with U.S.

de.title: Der mit UFOs verbundene General William Neil McCasland traf sich Stunden vor seinem Verschwinden mit Personal der US-Raumstreitkräfte, Audio
de.summary: Der pensionierte Generalmajor der US-Luftwaffe, William Neil McCasland, 68, wurde am 27. Februar 2026 in seinem Haus in Albuquerque als vermisst gemeldet. Von Law & Crime erhaltene Bodycam-Aufnahmen zeigen, dass McCasland an einem Abendessen mit US-Amerikanern teilnahm.

en.title: Whistleblower claims CIA used DNA data from Ancestry and 23andMe customers in search for aliens
en.summary: A whistleblower, philosopher and novelist Jason Reza Jorjani, claims the CIA allegedly used a backdoor to access 23andMe and Ancestry.com data to identify individuals with a genetic variance he says is linked to extraterrestrial DNA. Jorjani says he learned of the program from army veteran Lyn Buchanan, who claims he was a psychic spy in the CIA’s remote‑viewing program and that former CIA analyst Christopher “Kit” Green created the backdoor.

de.title: Whistleblower behauptet, die CIA habe DNA-Daten von Ancestry- und 23andMe-Kunden bei der Suche nach Außerirdischen verwendet
de.summary: Ein Whistleblower, Philosoph und Romanautor Jason Reza Jorjani, behauptet, die CIA habe angeblich eine Hintertür genutzt, um auf Daten von 23andMe und Ancestry.com zuzugreifen, um Personen mit einer genetischen Varianz zu identifizieren, die seiner Meinung nach mit außerirdischer DNA zusammenhängt. Jorjani sagt, er habe von dem Programm durch den Armeeveteranen Lyn Buchanan erfahren, der behauptet, er sei ein übersinnlicher Spion im Remote-Viewing-Programm der CIA gewesen und der ehemalige CIA-Analyst Christopher „Kit“ Green habe die Hintertür geschaffen.

en.title: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping
en.summary: Internet Thinks the UFO Files Are 'Distractions' And '4 Alien Species' Theory Isn't Helping While believers see slow disclosure, sceptics call the latest UFO wave 'pure science fiction. ' Fresh UFO file releases and a viral claim about 'four alien species' have pushed extraterrestrial conspiracy theories back into the centre of internet culture — but not everyone is buying it. As newly declassified government documents circulate online, many social media users are calling the latest wave of UFO disclosure a carefully timed distraction rather than proof of alien life.

de.title: Das Internet hält die UFO-Dateien für „Ablenkungen“ und die Theorie der „vier außerirdischen Arten“ hilft nicht weiter
de.summary: Das Internet denkt, die UFO-Dateien seien „Ablenkungen“ und die „4 außerirdische Arten“-Theorie hilft nicht. Während Gläubige eine langsame Offenlegung sehen, bezeichnen Skeptiker die jüngste UFO-Welle als „reine Science-Fiction“. Neue Veröffentlichungen von UFO-Dateien und eine virale Behauptung über „vier außerirdische Arten“ haben außerirdische Verschwörungstheorien wieder in den Mittelpunkt der Internetkultur gerückt – aber nicht jeder glaubt das. Während neu freigegebene Regierungsdokumente online kursieren, bezeichnen viele Social-Media-Nutzer die jüngste Welle der UFO-Enthüllungen als eine sorgfältig geplante Ablenkung und nicht als Beweis für das Leben von Außerirdischen.

en.title: Influencer reports alleged UFO sighting in Paraná, goes viral with millions of views, and says he lives between fascination and fear after mysterious phenomenon
en.summary: Lights recorded in the rural area of Campo Largo, unusual sounds in the forest, and an object observed for dozens of minutes transformed the routine of a content creator and mobilized specialists, curious people, and researchers of aerial phenomena A supposed UFO sighting in the rural area of Campo Largo, in the Metropolitan Region of Curitiba, transformed the life of digital influencer Mayk Leão, 31, in recent days. The case, recorded on the night of May 31, 2026, gained national attention after videos posted on social media accumulated millions of views and sparked debates about the possibility of an unusual aerial phenomenon.

de.title: Influencer meldet angebliche UFO-Sichtung in Paraná, wird millionenfach viral und sagt, er lebe zwischen Faszination und Angst nach einem mysteriösen Phänomen
de.summary: In der ländlichen Gegend von Campo Largo aufgenommene Lichter, ungewöhnliche Geräusche im Wald und ein Dutzende Minuten lang beobachtetes Objekt veränderten die Routine eines Content-Erstellers und mobilisierten Spezialisten, Neugierige und Forscher von Luftphänomenen. Eine angebliche UFO-Sichtung in der ländlichen Gegend von Campo Largo in der Metropolregion Curitiba veränderte in den letzten Tagen das Leben der digitalen Influencerin Mayk Leão, 31. Der in der Nacht des 31. Mai 2026 aufgezeichnete Fall erlangte landesweite Aufmerksamkeit, nachdem in den sozialen Medien veröffentlichte Videos millionenfach angeklickt wurden und Debatten über die Möglichkeit eines ungewöhnlichen Luftphänomens auslösten.

en.title: The World's Largest UFO Conference Is Open Today, and It's Free
en.summary: The world's largest UFO and UAP conference is underway in the Coachella Valley. Contact in the Desert opened its 12th annual event Thursday at the Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells, running through June 1. The conference brings together scientists, researchers, and journalists from around the world for panels and discussions on extraterrestrial life, UAP disclosure, and other unexplained phenomena.

de.title: Die weltweit größte UFO-Konferenz ist heute geöffnet und kostenlos
de.summary: Im Coachella Valley findet die weltweit größte UFO- und UAP-Konferenz statt. Contact in the Desert eröffnete am Donnerstag im Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells seine 12. jährliche Veranstaltung, die bis zum 1. Juni läuft. Die Konferenz bringt Wissenschaftler, Forscher und Journalisten aus der ganzen Welt zu Panels und Diskussionen über außerirdisches Leben, UAP-Offenlegung und andere ungeklärte Phänomene zusammen.
